prompt: Generate a website that populates like the template found in the skeleton design for a social network website
prompt_refined: Generate a social network website interface. Use the wireframe layout from image 1 as a template. Replace the generic placeholder elements (circles for avatars, horizontal lines for text) with specific UI components: profile pictures, usernames, timestamps, detailed post text, and interaction buttons (e.g., like, comment, share). Maintain the overall three-column structure depicted in image 1: a user profile panel on the left, a main feed composed of multiple distinct posts in the center, and a narrow activity or suggestion sidebar on the right.
objects: User profile panel on the left
Main feed with multiple distinct posts in the center
Narrow activity or suggestion sidebar on the right
Generic placeholder elements (circles for avatars, horizontal lines for text) (should not be present)
